name: Upland Software, Inc.
summary: Upland is a leader in AI-powered knowledge and content management software. Our solutions help enterprises unlock critical knowledge, automate content workflows, and drive measurable ROI in the following business functions: Knowledge Management. Upland provides Knowledge Management solutions designed to help organizations capture, organize, and distribute information to employees and customers.
